claim_bullets.bullet_text: The rulebook is for the roleplaying game Sword World RPG, guiding game progress through scenarios, player decisions, and random numbers (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.6-6).
The fictional world of Forcelia differs from the real world with magic and fictional creatures, but still has its own laws (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.6-6).
Rules in the book are fundamental to characterizing Forcelia, but not all laws are written; common sense should be applied (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.6-6).

source_record_text: This page summarizes the core purpose and foundational principles of the Sword World RPG rulebook as described in the chunk.
